title: Problem Brief: strategy-ready discovery packet
problem_summary: Product managers using AI-assisted operating tools still lose time and judgment quality because strategy context is reconstructed too late and too inconsistently from scattered discovery artifacts.
strategic_fit_summary: This problem supports a challenger posture because it lets ProductOS win on trusted PM strategy framing and traceability rather than on generic workspace breadth.
why_this_problem_now: AI makes drafting cheaper, which increases the relative cost of unclear strategy, weak differentiation, and missing north-star logic.
why_this_problem_for_this_segment: B2B product teams feel recurring strategy reconstruction costs often enough to adopt a PM-specific operating layer before replacing broader workflow tools.

evidence_refs.justification: The market work shows that trusted operating context is a durable gap in the category.
The next-version plan chose strategy/discovery leverage over broader distribution or autonomy expansion.
